slides.title: Day 3 — Customer Discovery
slides.body:
Entrepreneurs do not start with products.
They start with problems.

Today: observe, listen, persona — then opportunity.
discussionQuestions: What customer did you think about on the way in today?

slides.title: Problems Before Solutions
slides.body:
Great ventures solve painful problems.

Listen for: frequency, intensity, willingness to pay for relief.

Avoid solution-first thinking until problems are clear.
slides.speakerNotes: Use squad examples from Day 2 research plan. 5 min.
discussionQuestions: What problem did you hear repeatedly yesterday?

slides.title: Customer Segments
slides.body:
Demographics + psychographics + behavior.

Examples: young parents, freelancers, SME owners, OFW families.

Your squad segment should match your research market.
slides.speakerNotes: Connect to squad formation Day 1. 5 min.
discussionQuestions: Who is most affected by the problems you identified?

slides.title: Needs Analysis Mindset
slides.body:
Needs analysis is not a form — it is a conversation.

SPIKE squads conduct real surveys this week.
Today you design the persona that guides those conversations.
slides.speakerNotes: Preview survey activity in app. 4 min.
discussionQuestions: What question will you ask in your first survey?

slides.title: Deck 01 Close
slides.body:
Next: Deck 02 — Persona Workshop.
Then: market observation and squad presentations.
discussionQuestions: What will you observe in the next hour?
